message:
fix: extract Setpgid into platform-specific files for Windows cross-compilation (gt-rtxi)

doltserver.go used syscall.SysProcAttr{Setpgid: true} directly, which
fails on Windows because the Windows SysProcAttr struct does not have a
Setpgid field. Extract into sysproc_unix.go / sysproc_windows.go with
build tags, following the existing pattern in daemon/proc_{unix,windows}.go.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+//go:build !windows
+
+package doltserver
+
+import (
+	"os/exec"
+	"syscall"
+)
+
+// setProcessGroup puts the command in its own process group so that signals
+// sent to the parent process group (e.g. SIGHUP when the caller calls
+// syscall.Exec to become tmux) don't reach the spawned process.
+func setProcessGroup(cmd *exec.Cmd) {
+	cmd.SysProcAttr = &syscall.SysProcAttr{Setpgid: true}
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+//go:build windows
+
+package doltserver
+
+import "os/exec"
+
+// setProcessGroup is a no-op on Windows.
+// Windows does not support Unix process groups (Setpgid).
+func setProcessGroup(cmd *exec.Cmd) {}
